message:
feat: proptest verification suite for session restoration (wa-rsaf.2)

Property-based tests verifying the isomorphism property:
restore(snapshot(S)) ≈ S for all valid mux states.

19 tests across ~6600 random inputs covering:
- Layout restoration: pane count, unique IDs, structure preservation
- Scrollback injection: content preservation, truncation, byte accuracy
- Process planning: determinism, coverage, action classification
- Serde roundtrips: PaneNode, TopologySnapshot, PaneStateSnapshot, LaunchAction
- Edge cases: empty, single-pane, max-complexity (32-pane deep tree)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
